description: Daily morning digest: email + calendar + news + portfolio -> synthesized brief.

brief.question: Scan emails from the last 12 hours. Flag: (1) urgent items needing response, (2) scheduling threads that are stalled >3 days, (3) intros not yet actioned, (4) unanswered emails from known contacts >24h. Group by priority.
What's on the calendar today and this week? Flag conflicts, back-to-back meetings with no buffer, and any meetings without context (no agenda/notes).
Top 5 AI/tech/business headlines from the last 12 hours relevant to: AI agents, developer tools, fintech, or topics the user is actively tracking.

Synthesize the email, calendar, and news digests into a single morning brief. Format: (1) Top 3 priorities for today, (2) Calendar overview, (3) Emails needing attention, (4) Headlines worth knowing. Keep it under 500 words.

_note: First 3 steps run in parallel. Synthesis waits for all three.
